ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays in the game */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds for the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's home stadium */,
  "conference_division" TEXT /* Division of the conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, WR) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score of the team in the game */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles committed */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Total yards rushing by the team in the game */,
  "yards_passing" INTEGER /* Total yards passing by the team in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the team */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards lost due to penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Offensive Coordinator) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the coach's contract in years */,
  "salary" REAL /* Coach's annual salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue (City, State) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "betting_odds" REAL /* Betting odds for the team */,
  "over_under" REAL /* Over/under betting odds */,
  "point_spread" REAL /* Point spread betting odds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan's favorite team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fan */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., attended game, followed team) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_interactions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_interactions_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount contributed by the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
